quantification.why: Essentially every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. "Gadget outsells Widget by 12.9% in revenue" and West "is 53.8% below North."

specificity.why: Each recommendation names products, regions, and figures, e.g. "Prioritize Gadget stock in North and East" and bundling Sprocket's "$4.75 price with high-value Gadget purchases."

insight_density.why: It surfaces multiple non-obvious, actionable observations like the right-skewed distribution and that "North's lead rests on a single $598.00 Gadget order" and West trailing "despite only one fewer order."

insight_density.why: Multiple non-obvious, actionable observations appear, such as the right-skew from high-value orders, North's lead resting "on a single $598.00 Gadget order," and West trailing "despite only one fewer order."

quantification.why: Essentially every comparison carries a computed figure, e.g. "Gadget outsells Widget by 12.9% in revenue" and West "is 53.8% below North."

specificity.why: Each recommendation names products, regions, and figures, e.g. "Prioritize Gadget stock in North and East, where high-price orders drive Gadget's 33.4% revenue share."
